summary: The false statement about Scammon’s growth curve is Option B, which incorrectly claims lymphoid tissues grow to 200% by age 13 and regress afterward; this level of detail lacks support from available medical references. Accurate descriptions include early completion of neural tissue growth by age 6 and primary genital growth occurring during puberty.

Accurate descriptions include early completion of neural tissue growth by age 6 and primary genital growth occurring during puberty.. Answer choice: B
